errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `RecordingEmbedder.embed_images` overrides parent class `Embedder` in an inconsistent manner
  `RecordingEmbedder.embed_images` has type `(self: RecordingEmbedder, images: list[str]) -> Coroutine[Unknown, Unknown, list[list[float]]]`, which is not assignable to `(self: RecordingEmbedder, images: list[Image | str]) -> Coroutine[Unknown, Unknown, list[list[float]]]`, the type of `Embedder.embed_images`
  Signature mismatch:
  expected: def embed_images(self: RecordingEmbedder, images: list[Image | str]) -> Coroutine[Unknown, Unknown, list[list[float]]]: ...
                                                                   ^^^^^^^^ parameters
  found:    def embed_images(self: RecordingEmbedder, images: list[str]) -> Coroutine[Unknown, Unknown, list[list[float]]]: ...
                                                                   ^ parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `RecordingEmbedder.embed_images` overrides parent class `Embedder` in an inconsistent manner
